settings.title: Five Years and Forty Launches
settings.excerpt: This month Codebase turns five, and we went back through every project to see what we learned.
settings.body:
Five years ago this was two people and a borrowed desk. Forty launches later, the lesson that keeps repeating is a simple one.

The sites that did best were never the flashiest. They were the ones where the client knew exactly who the page was for and what it should ask the visitor to do.

Thank you to every business that trusted a small studio with something this important. We are spending part of this anniversary giving free mentoring hours to two people learning to code in our area, because someone once did the same for us.
